summary: Contract is structurally sound. Non-goals correctly preserve CLI source (task-001) and skill/agent docs (task-002). Bundle grep on CJS JS output is more precise than native strings. Edge cases cover bundled-JS-not-binary, heredoc single-quote quoting, mtime sanity, trailing-space grep to dodge --data-source false positives, and spawnSync signal check to distinguish self-exit from timeout-kill.
concerns: Step 8 TTY simulation inherits parent stdin which under a test runner is typically a pipe, not a TTY — may not exercise the real hang path. Document as best-effort.
